# TGLW — Lift Weights Touch Grass

## Product
Black tee with palm tree + sun graphic. "LIFT WEIGHTS TOUCH GRASS."
100% cotton. $25 USD.

## Sizes
S, M, L, XL, 2XL

## How to Buy
POST /api/checkout
Payment: $25 USDC on Base (x402 protocol)

Request body:
{
  "shipping": {
    "name": "Your Name",
    "address1": "123 Main St",
    "city": "Los Angeles",
    "state": "CA",
    "zip": "90001",
    "country": "US"
  },
  "size": "L"
}

The endpoint is x402-protected. Send your payment signature in the Payment-Signature header.
On success, you'll receive an order confirmation with tracking details.

## How to Buy (Agent / SPT)
POST /api/checkout
Payment: Stripe SPT (Shared Payment Token)
Header: X-Shared-Payment-Token: spt_...

Same request body as above. Create an SPT scoped to this merchant, include it in the header, and the checkout is fully automated.

## Structured Data
See /.well-known/x402.json for machine-parseable product and payment info.
